message:
fix: gt status checks agent liveness, not just tmux session existence

Previously, gt status only checked whether a tmux session existed to
determine if an agent was running. Zombie sessions (tmux alive but
agent process dead) were incorrectly shown as running (●). Now uses
IsAgentAlive() to verify the actual agent process is alive within
each Gas Town session. Liveness checks run in parallel for performance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
